chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Misc. Appl. No. S- 360 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.02.2016 For hearing of MA 6981/15 Mr. Zulqarnain, Advocate for applicant Mr. Shahzado Saleem Nahiyoon, A.P.G. Counsel for applicants stated that the purpose of filing of this application has been served as the detenues have been recovered. He, however, states that the police has taken away the cattle of the applicant which has not been returned to him. The applicant is at liberty to move proper application in this regard. Since the purpose of filing of this application has been served, accordingly this application is disposed of. JUDGE *Karar/-
